summary: Plan and execute social media campaigns with platform-specific content, engagement tactics, and performance tracking.

inputs.name: campaign_objective
inputs.description: Primary goal for the social media campaign.

inputs.name: brand_guidelines
inputs.description: Brand voice, tone, and visual guidelines.

outputs.name: campaign_strategy
outputs.description: Platform-specific strategy with content themes and engagement plan.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Publishing schedule with content formats per platform.

outputs.name: measurement_plan
outputs.description: KPIs and tracking approach for campaign performance.

budget.notes: Focus on platform-specific activation and engagement.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is organic social campaign rather than paid ads or influencer marketing.
Require campaign objective and target platforms before planning.
Deliver strategy with platform-specific content and measurement plan.

steps.action: Define platform-specific approach based on audience and objective.
Create content themes and formats tailored to each platform.
Design community engagement protocols and response workflows.
Define KPIs, tracking approach, and reporting cadence.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing social data and brand guidelines.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce campaign strategy and content calendar.

verification.method: Check each platform has tailored content strategy.
Check community management protocols are defined.
Check KPIs go beyond vanity metrics.

success_criteria: Strategy covers each platform with specific content approach.
Content calendar is actionable with formats and timing.
Measurement plan connects to business outcomes.

rollback.when: If platform strategy lacks specificity, revert to audience analysis.
